title: Kothikudhe Manasu Lyrics Sivappu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kothikudhe Manasu
Singer(s): Karthik
Movie: Sivappu
Music: N R Raghunandhan
Lyrics:

Kothikudhe manasu olayaa
enna mulusaa mulunditta alayaa.
indha ulagathil enakkku uravunu
sollikka oruthi kidachita nelayaa.
en usurayum unakku uyilaa ezhudhi
koduthadhu enna pilaiyaa?

Panangaattil uyir pochuda
nee thandhaai pudhu moochuda
naam marupadi ingae valanumnu
manasu thudikkudhada

Yaarumattra nerathula
nee iruppa dhoorathula.
pakkathula ulladhupol
pesikkuven thannaala.

Yegapatta aasapulla
yaarukitta naanum solla.
moodi vachi munagurendi
moodaavadhu saamathula.

Killi uchi maramthaandi
oru patchi ena thaediye
en manasukull vandhu
koodonnu katti kudithanam nadanthudhadi

Sondham thaedi odi vandha
indha nadhi unkarayil.
kattupattu ninidiche
kaaranamthaan thonala.

Indhu magaa samuthiramey
yaengudhadi unna thaanga.
eppadi naan vittuduven
en manasu ketkala.

Vannikaattu mannukkulla
aasayellaam podhachi vacha.
unna kanda pinnaalathaan thondi
edukkuren.

nee saaya en thozhudi
nee nadakka en kaaludi
nee marupadi ingae
kuzhandhaya maaridida
thaaren en usura...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kothikudhe Manasu?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotional turmoil of a romantic relationship.

Who is the singer of Kothikudhe Manasu?

The song is sung by the talented Karthik.

Who composed the music for Sivappu?

The music for the movie Sivappu was composed by N. R. Raghunanthan.

What is the release year of the movie Sivappu?

The movie Sivappu was released in 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kothikudhe Manasu from the movie Sivappu beautifully captures the essence of love and emotional conflict. Sung by Karthik, the melody evokes a sense of longing and nostalgia, reflecting the inner turmoil of the characters. The lyrics express the deep connection and yearning between lovers, making it a poignant piece. N. R. Raghunanthan's music complements the heartfelt lyrics, creating a memorable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the heartfelt emotions in Kothikudhe Manasu from the movie Sivappu. Karthik's soulful voice combined with N. R. Raghunanthan's evocative music creates a mesmerizing melody. Dive into this romantic and melancholic journey that captures the essence of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: The heart is excited, is it okay? It feels completely overwhelmed. In this world, I found someone to call my own. I even gave my life to you, what is this connection?
Life left the palm tree, you gave me new breath. My heart beats to live here again.
When others change, you are far away. I talk as if you are nearby.
I have many desires, but I don't tell anyone. I keep them hidden and grumble quietly.
Like a whirlwind, you gathered me and held me together. You are the one who can bear it.
A bird flew over the tree and came searching into my heart, building a nest and settling down.
The river that came running to find its home stopped at your shore. I don't know the reason.
This vast ocean is restless, unable to bear you. How can I let go? My heart doesn't ask.
I buried all my desires in the colorful soil. After seeing you, I dig them up again.
You are my shadow, you are my steps. I will let you become a child here again, my life.
